auth.invalid_token: Session expired, please log in again
auth.rate_limited: Too many login attempts, please try again later

pr.already_converted: This requisition has already been converted to a PO
pr.must_be_approved_to_convert: pr must be approved to convert
pr.partial_no_items: Select at least one item line to convert
pr.partial_unknown_item: Selected item line does not belong to this PR
pr.partial_already_converted: Selected item lines have already been converted to a PO
pr.already_fully_converted: All items in this PR are already converted to POs
pr.proxy_not_allowed: You don't have permission to submit PRs on behalf of others
pr.requester_not_found: Specified requester not found or inactive
pr.cannot_delete_active: Cannot delete a requisition that is under approval or converted to a PO

po.cannot_delete_has_shipments: Cannot delete a PO that has shipments
po.cannot_delete_has_payments: Cannot delete a PO that has payment records
po.cannot_delete_has_contracts: Cannot delete a PO linked to a contract
po.cannot_delete_has_invoices: Cannot delete a PO that has invoices

po_item.qty_must_be_positive: Quantity must be greater than zero
po_item.qty_below_received: New quantity is less than the already-received quantity
po_item.cannot_edit_has_invoices: Lines with invoices cannot have quantity or unit price changed
po_item.cannot_delete_has_shipments: Cannot delete a PO line that has shipments
po_item.cannot_delete_has_invoices: Cannot delete a PO line that has invoices

fulfillment.invalid_type: Invalid fulfillment type. Allowed: equivalent / downgraded / substitute / supplementary
fulfillment.qty_must_be_positive: Fulfillment quantity must be greater than zero
fulfillment.qty_exceeds_soft_limit: Combined contribution exceeds 150% of the original PR demand. Please verify before proceeding
fulfillment.link_already_exists: A fulfillment link between this PO line and PR line already exists
fulfillment.supplementary_pr_mismatch: The PR line for this supplementary item does not belong to this PO's PR

sla.escalated_submitter_body: Your PR '{title}' has been pending approval for over {hours} hours. Current stage: {stage}
sla.escalated_manager_body: PR '{title}' has exceeded SLA of {hours} hours. Stage: {stage}
sla.escalated_admin_body: PR '{title}' (#{biz_number}) has been overdue for {hours} hours. Stage: {stage}

reminder.pending_body: You have a pending approval for PR '{title}' (#{biz_number}) waiting for {hours} hours. Stage: {stage}

feishu.not_configured: Feishu App ID or App Secret is not configured
feishu.token_failed: Failed to obtain Feishu access token

test.user_not_found: Current admin account not found in Feishu

delivery_plan.invalid_qty: Planned quantity must be greater than 0
delivery_plan.missing_po_or_contract: Delivery plan must be linked to a PO or contract
delivery_plan.already_complete: Delivery plan is complete and cannot be modified

department.parent_cycle: Department parent relationship has a cycle
department.parent_company_mismatch: Parent department belongs to a different company

supplier.has_pr_items: Supplier has purchase requisitions, cannot delete
supplier.has_price_records: Supplier has price records, cannot delete

digest.no_expiring_contracts: No contracts expiring in the configured window.
digest.upcoming_payments_text: {count} payment(s) due in the next 7 days, total {amount}.
digest.overdue_approvals_text: {count} approval(s) have exceeded the SLA deadline.
digest.email_footer: This digest was automatically generated by Mica (觅采).

contract.not_editable_in_status: Contract cannot be edited in its current status
contract.cannot_delete_with_paid_schedule: Contract has paid payment records and cannot be deleted
contract.number_required: Contract number must not be empty
contract.number_duplicate: Contract number is already in use

template.file_missing_on_disk: Template file is missing on server, please re-upload
template.supplier_missing: Supplier information missing, cannot generate document
template.contract_required_for_generation: Document generation requires a contract, but this PO has none

po_contract_link.not_found: No link exists between this PO and contract
po_contract_link.cannot_unlink_primary: Cannot unlink the primary PO from this contract
po_contract_link.cannot_remove_last: Cannot unlink: this is the contract's last PO association
po_contract_link.has_payments: Cannot unlink: this PO already has payment records referencing this contract
po_contract_link.supplier_mismatch: Cannot link PO and contract with different suppliers
po_contract_link.company_mismatch: Cannot link PO and contract from different companies
po_contract_link.currency_mismatch: Cannot link PO and contract with different currencies

payment.contract_required: Payment must be associated with a contract
payment.contract_po_mismatch: Selected contract does not belong to this purchase order
payment.schedule_parent_mismatch: Schedule item does not belong to the selected contract/PO
payment.schedule_requires_primary_po: Contract schedule payments must be recorded against the contract's primary PO
payment.cannot_delete_confirmed: Confirmed payments cannot be deleted — reverse first

schedule_item.cannot_delete_paid: Cannot delete a paid schedule item
schedule_item.already_paid: This installment has already been paid

invoice.number_duplicate: This supplier already has an invoice with the same number

user.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account
user.cannot_delete_last_admin: Cannot delete the last active admin
user.has_references: This user is referenced by existing records (PR/PO/approvals/audit logs) and cannot be hard-deleted. Disable the account instead.

item.has_po_items: Item has purchase order line items, cannot delete
item.has_pr_items: Item has purchase requisition line items, cannot delete
item.has_price_records: Item has price records, cannot delete
item.has_price_benchmarks: Item has price benchmarks, cannot delete
item.has_price_anomalies: Item has price anomaly records, cannot delete
